market_sentiment.label: 中性
market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: HIVE buys $58 million Toronto plot for AI facility; shares climb
articles.description: The bitcoin mining firm continues on its investment path into AI data centers after raising $115 million to expand its global footprint in the industry.

articles.title: Kin Health raises $9M to build an AI notetaker for patients
articles.description: The app is similar to a meeting notetaker: you can record doctor visits, and it will return an AI summary of the meeting, with the next steps, all of which you share with family and friends if you want to.

articles.title: Hyperliquid eyes 55% price rise after Silicon Valley investor's 'massive HYPE buy'
articles.description: A bullish long-term chart pattern puts HYPE on track for a potential rally above $70 this year, with a16z-linked accumulation and fresh institutional catalysts strengthening the case.

articles.title: Ex-OpenAI's Leopold Aschenbrenner bets big on crypto miners for his $13.6 billion AI play
articles.description: Aschenbrenner is shorting Nvidia and AMD in favor of bitcoin miners that own the electricity and data centers needed to fuel the next phase of the AI boom.

articles.title: UK proposes near-24/7 settlement to prepare markets for tokenization
articles.description: The FCA and Bank of England are seeking feedback on new tokenization guidance and plans to extend operating hours for the UK’s core payment and settlement infrastructure toward near-24/7 availability.

articles.title: Amazon’s new Alexa+ powered feature can generate podcast episodes
articles.description: Amazon’s Alexa+ can now generate custom AI podcasts on demand, as the company expands its assistant into a personalized AI content platform.

articles.title: Live markets: Bitcoin gives up all of May's gains, slipping below $77,000
articles.description: Strategy made a mammoth $2 billion bitcoin purchase last week, but it's not lifting crypto spirits or prices.

articles.title: Bitcoin Depot stock crashes 71% premarket after Chapter 11 filing
articles.description: Bitcoin Depot files for Chapter 11 in Texas, plans asset sale and wind-down as regulatory pressure forces shutdown of its Bitcoin ATM network.

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin says AI 'formal verification' could actually make crypto much more secure
articles.description: The Ethereum co-founder argued that AI-assisted "formal verification"  could become one of the most important tools for cybersecurity in a new blog post.

articles.title: Deploi Launches Direct Issuance Infrastructure for Private Credit on Polygon, Secures ISIN Allocations from Nasdaq CSD
articles.description: EUR 1 billion note programme planned for 2026 following completion of global issuance infrastructure by the end of Q3 2026.

articles.title: Saylor’s Strategy scoops $2B Bitcoin, holdings reach 843,738 BTC
articles.description: Michael Saylor’s Strategy bought 24,869 Bitcoin for $2.01 billion last week, lifting holdings to 843,738 BTC as STRC sales funded around 97% of the acquisition.

articles.title: Open source tool maker Grafana Labs says hackers stole its code, refuses to pay ransom
articles.description: The open source project said hackers stole its codebase and threatened to publish its source code if the company did not pay.

articles.title: Kraken parent Payward's Q1 revenue climbs despite crypto market slump
articles.description: Co-CEO Arjun Sethi said the firm kept investing through market weakness, leaning on acquisitions and futures growth to offset softer spot trading.

articles.title: XRP slips 2% as profit-taking knocks token back below $1.40
articles.description: XRP gave back gains after a high-volume selloff erased the latest breakout attempt, though buyers stepped back in near support around $1.38.

articles.title: Standard Chartered to absorb Zodia Custody’s core business, spin out Zodia Solutions
articles.description: Standard Chartered will absorb Zodia Custody’s regulated crypto business and spin out Zodia Solutions, as big banks move to own core digital asset custody in-house.

articles.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) drops 13% as all assets decline
articles.description: Bittensor (TAO), down 9.6% over the weekend, joined Bitcoin Cash (BCH) as an underperformer.

articles.title: Bitcoin faces outsized quantum threat as computing breakthroughs accelerate, Citi says
articles.description: The bank said accelerating advances in quantum computing are compressing the timeline for risks to crypto and broader internet infrastructure, with Bitcoin seen as particularly exposed.

articles.title: Bitmine buys the dip as Tom Lee ties ether's pullback to rising oil prices
articles.description: The Ethereum treasury firm bought over 71,000 ETH last week, a sharp increase from the previous week's purchases.

articles.title: Strategy made mammoth $2 billion bitcoin purchase last week
articles.description: Michael Saylor and team added 24,869 BTC last week, bringing total holdings to 843,738 coins.

articles.title: South Korea's KB Financial completes stablecoin pilot for offline payments
articles.description: The parent company of South Korea’s largest bank completed a stablecoin payment pilot ahead of the country's proposed digital asset framework.
